title: Smart Data Models - Agri Pest
description: This entity contains a harmonised description of an agricultural pest.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type: It has to be AgriPest

agroVocConcept.description: Relationship. Model:'http://schema.org/URL'. Reference to the agrovoc term associated with this item

hasAgriProductType.description: Relationship. Model:'http://schema.org/URL'. Reference to the recommended types of product that can be used to treat this pest
